headline: CIBC Capital Markets CDRs Closes the Market
summary: Toronto, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - July 22, 2026) - Elliot Scherer, Managing Director and Head, CIBC Capital Markets, and his team, joined Graham MacKenzie, Managing Director, Exchange Traded Products, Toronto Stock Exchange ("TSX") to close the market to celebrate the fifth anniversary of CIBC CDRs, and the launch of the recent listing of two new Canadian Depositary Receipts (CDRs) on TSX:Honeywell Aerospace CDR (CAD Hedged) (TSX: HONA)SpaceX CDR (CAD Hedged) (TSX: SPCX)Cannot view this video?

headline: This Dividend Stock Beat Expectations Again. Here’s The New Price Target
summary: 3M just posted its fifth consecutive earnings beat and raised full-year guidance, but lingering litigation risks and a divided analyst camp raise a real question about whether the rally has legs or is running on borrowed time.

headline: Nasdaq tipped to slip as investors brace for Alphabet and Tesla earnings
summary: Wall Street stocks looked set for a weaker open on Wednesday as investors lock in profits in technology stocks ahead of crucial earnings from Google owner Alphabet and Tesla, while escalating tensions in the Middle East push oil prices to six-week highs. Dow Jones futures were down 0.2%,...

headline: Honeywell (HON) Stock Looks Undervalued On Its Q2 Earnings Preview
summary: Honeywell International stock has just had a rough month, with the share price down 49.8%, while the latest valuation checks suggest the company does not screen as a clear bargain even after that drop. Over the past month, Honeywell International has fallen 49.8%, which puts the current share price move firmly in focus for anyone thinking about valuation. Recent portfolio reshaping, including acquisitions such as the Catalyst Technologies deal and ongoing restructuring, can support longer...

headline: Is Honeywell International (HON) Undervalued As It Reaffirms 2026 Guidance?
summary: Guidance update and what it means for Honeywell International stock Honeywell International (HON) recently reaffirmed its 2026 sales outlook and detailed earnings guidance that separates the impact of its Aerospace Technologies spin off, giving investors a clearer view of the reshaped core business. For the full year, Honeywell International expects sales between $19.9b and $20.2b, in line with its previous range. Management also outlined diluted earnings per share from continuing operations...
